metadata.description: Reverse-decode short-form videos. /scout downloads, transcribes, and visually analyzes a Reel/TikTok/Short, then applies the reverse-decode prompt pack to extract why it works and a transferable structure.

plugins.name: reel-scout
plugins.description: Reverse-decode a short-form video (URL). Downloads with yt-dlp, extracts keyframes with ffmpeg, transcribes and runs a local VLM, then applies the 4-beat reverse-decode prompt pack.
